name: Chadwicks

notes: POC catalog and every frozen item were coordinator-reconciled.
All four official-matrix search classes completed; direct positives are retained and missing disclosure remains unavailable.
POC closeout uses a verified target-specific catalog transformation; shared-parser review is deferred.
Coordinator terminal catalog derived from validated Luna research and serialized APPLY output.

adjudication.rationale: Research structure, current product mappings, direct allergen authority, target repair, Ingredient Intelligence timing, focused validation, and idempotency passed the POC terminal gates.

evidence.excerpt: Current restaurant-issued brunch, lunch, dinner, and dessert PDFs enumerate food and nonalcoholic menu items and ingredient descriptions; they include a raw/undercooked-food advisory but no allergen matrix.

Restaurant-linked Toast ordering identifies Chadwicks Old Town at 203 Strand Street, Alexandria and exposes the current lunch/dinner food catalog and item descriptions; no allergen matrix or cross-contact statement found.
Current weekly specials list Tacos del Dia, Ma’s Meatloaf, Pasta Night, and Fish & Chips.
Current happy-hour PDF lists six food offerings; most correspond to the main catalog, with Cheddarjack Nachos additionally represented.
Official homepage identifies Chadwicks at 203 Strand Street, Alexandria, VA 22314 and links its current menu PDFs and ordering.

notes: POC worker artifacts persisted by the root coordinator.

repairs.summary: Applied and validated the restaurant-specific POC catalog repair.
verificationCommands: recompute Ingredient Intelligence after direct finalization
run twice and compare owned bytes
